Asbury Park Press exposes voting fraud

Paul D'Ambrosio Asbury Park (NJ) Press October 1994
Data & DatabasesCrime & JusticeGovernment & Politics

This investigative piece reveals how deceased individuals were recorded as voting in New Jersey, using data from the Social Security Death Master File to uncover significant voter roll inaccuracies and potential fraud.

E gads! The dead are still voting in New Jersey... To be absolutely certain a voter was dead, I obtained hard copy death certificates from the state, checked voting signature books and called the next of kin before confronting election officials.
